hero.title: Professional Salon Management,
hero.subtitle: simple and effective.
hero.description: A comprehensive solution to help you manage appointments, staff, and revenue. Optimize operations so you can focus on customer care.

features.title: Everything you need to run your Salon
features.subtitle: No more messy paperwork. Focus on your craft, we handle the rest.

appointments.name: Appointment Management
appointments.description: Smart scheduling, no overlaps. Customers can book online 24/7.

staff.name: Staff Management
staff.description: Track attendance, payroll, and commissions automatically. Granular permissions.

revenue.name: Revenue Reports
revenue.description: Visual charts for revenue, costs, and profit by day, week, month.

services.name: Service Management
services.description: Flexible service list, easy price and duration setup.

marketing.name: Automated Marketing
marketing.description: Send automated reminders, birthday wishes, and review requests via SMS.

security.name: Security & Safety
security.description: Encrypted data and daily backups. Committed to customer data security.

pricing.title: Choose a plan that fits your scale
pricing.contact_us: Please contact us for a consultation.
pricing.addon_subtitle: Purchase on demand, for example buying more points or SMS messages.
pricing.addon_1k_desc: Send appointment reminders and marketing messages.

modal.plan_redirect_notice: You will be redirected to the registration page to complete the process.
modal.subscribe_notice: You will be redirected to the payment page to purchase this plan.
modal.addon_redirect_notice: You will be redirected to the payment page to purchase this addon.

footer.description: Professional salon and nail management solution, helping you optimize operations and increase revenue.

register.title: Salon Registration
register.feature_1_desc: Easily manage appointments and staff shifts.
register.feature_2_desc: Keep customers engaged with smart reminders.
register.feature_3_desc: Insights that help your business grow.
register.trial_notice: Sign up today and get 14 days of free trial. No credit card required.

success.title: Registration Successful!
success.message: Your salon has been created. Please log in to your dashboard to get started.

login.title: Login
login.welcome: Welcome back! Please enter your details.
login.register_success: Registration successful! Please sign in to continue.
login.branding_desc: Join over 2,000+ salon owners who have transformed their business with our intelligent management platform.
login.testimonial_text: This software completely changed how we handle appointments. Our efficiency increased by 40% in the first month!

success.title: Login Successful!
success.message: Welcome back. Choose a plan to get started.
